song.title: Lord I am continually with Thee
song.lyrics: [v1] Lord, I am continually with Thee, Thou hast holden me by my right hand Thou shalt guide me… Thou shalt guide me with Thy counsel And afterward receive me, receive me to glory. [v2] Who have I in heaven but Thee? And there is none upon the earth That I desire beside Thee. My flesh and my heart faileth: But God is the strength of my heart And my portion forever.
